title: Havengarde
description: A pack of nonsense for Havengarde
body:
This texture pack utilizes the CIT feature of optifine to replace some items with a different model and texture. 

The pack has been rewritten completely! The original version with all sorts of random shenanigans is still there. 

However! With the Constellation Dance event happening on TTRP this pack will pivot to be a bit more serious and public! Rather than being a pack for those of Havengarde. This is a pack from Havengarde to everyone else!

Beginning with 
# Action Figures!

Currently we have 13 action figures!

11 of them are our regular figures with 9 different poses!

1 is for a dear friend of mine

1 is for a lovely pair!

The first version of the action figures was a bit of a rush job! As such some things are scuffed. But do not worry, I will fix it up when I am no longer in such rush.
